allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/softpower.json'\); const c=d.countries; console.log\('Countries:', c.length\); for\(const[k,v] of Object.entries\(d.data\)\){if\(v.length!==c.length\)console.log\('BAD:',k,v.length\);} console.log\('All rows checked. Self-values:'\); for\(const[k,v] of Object.entries\(d.data\)\){const i=c.indexOf\(k\); if\(v[i]!==0\)console.log\(k,'self not 0:',v[i]\);} console.log\('Done'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/sp_check.json'\); for\(const[k,v] of Object.entries\(d.data\)\){const s=v.reduce\(\(a,b\)=>a+b,0\); if\(s!==100\) console.log\(k,'sum=',s\);} console.log\('Validation done'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/softpower.json'\); const c=d.countries; let ok=true; for\(const[k,v] of Object.entries\(d.data\)\){const s=Math.round\(v.reduce\(\(a,b\)=>a+b,0\)*10\)/10; if\(Math.abs\(s-100\)>0.5\){console.log\(k,'sum=',s\);ok=false;} const si=c.indexOf\(k\); if\(v[si]<20\)console.log\(k,'self=',v[si],'\(low?\)'\);} if\(ok\)console.log\('All rows ~100%'\); console.log\('USA self=',d.data.USA[0],'CHN self=',d.data.CHN[1],'PRK self=',d.data.PRK[13]\)")
